description: Regression guard: static shell payloads, non-shell arrays, canonical Dockerode argv, opaque array vars, and execSync(cmd, { env: process.env }) must not fire SHELL_ESCAPE.

expected.notes: Constant shell payload — no idents in element 2, detector emits no sink filter.
First element is not a known shell — detector ignores even though element 2 is tainted.
Canonical Dockerode argv form — constant array, locked in by EXCLUDES.
Opaque variable, not a literal — detector inspects only literal arrays.
execSync(cmd, { env: process.env }) — arg 1 is the options object, not the command. Locked in by =execSync gate's payload_args: &[0].
